description_long: This handbag features a soft, denim-like blue fabric upper section paired with a sturdy white base, giving it a modern, urban look. The bag is equipped with a prominent silver-tone chain strap, which threads through two large metallic grommets at the top, allowing for both carrying and closure. The chain is long enough to be used as a shoulder or crossbody strap, and its metallic finish adds a touch of industrial style. The top of the bag appears to cinch closed, likely using the chain as a drawstring mechanism. The overall shape is rounded and slightly slouchy, with the fabric forming gentle folds and creases. No visible logos or brand markings are present, and the exterior is free from additional decorative elements or patterns.
description: A blue and white rounded handbag with a silver chain strap and metallic grommets, featuring a soft fabric upper and a sturdy base. The bag closes with a drawstring-style chain and has a minimalist, urban design.
description_view_0: The back of the handbag is visible, showing the chain strap looped through the grommets and resting against the blue fabric, with the white base clearly defined.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the chain strap, which is laid out on the ground, and the smooth transition between the blue upper and white base.
description_view_2: The front of the handbag is shown, with the chain strap extending forward and the grommets prominently displayed at the top opening.
description_view_3: Another side view, emphasizing the slouchy fabric texture and the way the chain strap drapes to the side, with the white base curving around the bottom.
attribute_strap_type: Single long silver-tone chain strap, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, non-adjustable, attached via large metallic grommets.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Drawstring closure using the chain strap threaded through two large metallic grommets at the top opening.
attribute_decorative_elements: Silver-tone chain strap and large metallic grommets serve as both functional and decorative hardware.
